languageSelection.title: What language would you like to use?

landing.welcomeSubtitle: Congratulations on taking one extra step towards your calling.
landing.discoverIkigaiDesc: Explore the intersection of your passion, mission, vocation, and profession to find your true purpose.
landing.setGoalsDesc: Transform your overarching purpose into actionable, daily objectives that move you forward every day.
landing.trackProgressDesc: Visualize your growth with intuitive insights and reflections that keep your actions aligned with your soul.

home.feelingAnxiousBody: Click on me if you are unsure, need support or stuck.
home.atlasGreeting: Hello! I'm Atlas, your journey guide. How can I help you today?
questions: What does my ideal day look like?
What brings me joy and peace?
What did I want to be when I was younger?
When do I feel most like myself?
What are three things that brought me joy this week?
What colors, music, or scents make me happiest?
What's one thing I want to improve about myself this month?
What's something I wish others knew about me?
What do I look forward to every day?
Who inspires me, and why?
What's a lesson I've recently learned about myself?
What's a lesson I had to learn recently?
What kind of people do I want around me?
What is something I don't regret?
When do I feel most confident or powerful?
What parts of myself need more love from me?
What causes are worth fighting for?
What's something about me most people don't know but should?
What does self-love look like for me?
What are three words that describe who I am right now?
Who inspires me the most, and why?
What is one thing I can do to feel more present in daily life?
What would I do with unlimited money?
When was the last time I did something I was afraid of? What was it?
If my heart had a theme song right now, what would it be?
What am I most proud of?
What do I wish I did more of?
What makes me feel most jealous?
Who would I like to reconnect with, and why?
What qualities do I judge harshly in others, and how might they reflect parts of me?
What would I do differently if I weren't afraid of judgment or failure?
What's one trait I see in others that I wish I had?
When do I feel most insecure, and what triggers those feelings?
Is there something I'm not being honest with myself about?
What has been the hardest thing to forgive myself for?
Is there someone whose approval I'm secretly seeking? What would having it change?
In what ways do I sabotage my own success, and what might be driving it?
What are my biggest fears, and how do they limit my decisions?
What unmet needs from childhood am I still trying to fulfill?
What's the biggest lie I keep telling myself?

onboarding.step1Content: Atlas will stay with you throughout the whole process of finding your calling.
onboarding.currentLifeContextSubtitle: We need to know where you are to suggest where to go.
onboarding.currentSituationQuestion: What best describes your current situation?
onboarding.biggestConstraintQuestion: What's your biggest constraint right now?
onboarding.whatMattersQuestion: What matters most in your next chapter? (select up to 3)

onboarding.noPathsAvailable: No paths available. Please try again.
onboarding.dontKnowBirthTime: I don't know my birth time
onboarding.dontKnowTimeModalText: Please try to think of at least an approximate time of when you were born. That will help us to create the most accurate report for you.
onboarding.fillRequiredFields: Please fill in all required fields: Name, Date of Birth, and City of Birth.
onboarding.fillBirthTime: Please fill in your birth time or select "I don't know my birth time".
onboarding.birthLocationHelper: 💡 Birth location & time helps calculate your rising sign more accurately
onboarding.pledgeText: I, {name}, hereby vow to build a life I always wanted to have. I vow from this day forward, for better or worse, to never give up on my dreams and potential.
onboarding.pledgeSubtext: There are a few more questions ahead. Please don't give up on them, every detail matters.
onboarding.whatsDreamGoal: What's a dream goal you have that excites and scares you?
onboarding.whatsDreamGoalSubtext: Think about the vision that keeps you up at night with both joy and nervousness.
onboarding.whatsFearOrBarrier: What specific fear or barrier holds you back from this?
onboarding.whatsFearOrBarrierSubtext: Identifying the wall is the first step to climbing over it. Be as specific as possible.
onboarding.whatMightHoldYouBack: What might hold you back from pursuing {pathName}?
onboarding.whatMightHoldYouBackSubtext: Share any fears, doubts, or obstacles you anticipate. This helps us acknowledge and address them throughout your journey.
onboarding.defineYourSuccess: Define how success looks for you
onboarding.buildYourRoute: Build your route with stages you choose

yazioFlow.welcomeAtlasText: Nice to meet you, {{name}}! I'm Atlas, and I'll be your guide.
yazioFlow.whyHereQuestion: What's bringing you to Calling today?

whyHereOptions.lost: I feel lost and don't know my purpose
whyHereOptions.consistency: I want to achieve my goals but struggle with consistency
whyHereOptions.transition: I'm going through a major life transition
whyHereOptions.fulfilled: I want to feel more fulfilled and motivated

yazioFlow.currentFeelingQuestion: How are you feeling about your life right now?
yazioFlow.whatHeldBackQuestion: What's been holding you back from feeling fulfilled?

whatHeldBackOptions.clarity: I don't know what I truly want
whatHeldBackOptions.finish: I keep starting but never finish

yazioFlow.atlasEncouragementText: Don't worry, I'm here to make this easier for you. We'll take it one clear step at a time.
yazioFlow.pastAttemptsQuestion: What have you tried before to find direction?

pastAttemptsOptions.nothingYet: Nothing yet — this is my first step

yazioFlow.insightStatText: Studies show that people who reflect daily are 42% more likely to achieve their goals and report higher life satisfaction.
yazioFlow.pastChallengesQuestion: What challenges did you face in the past?

pastChallengesOptions.plan: I didn't have a clear plan
pastChallengesOptions.alone: I felt alone in my journey

successInspirationOptions.daily: Taking it one day at a time

futureSelfOptions.purpose: Waking up with purpose every day
futureSelfOptions.proud: Being proud of who I've become

yazioFlow.futureSelfAtlasSubtitle: Your future is not far away. Stay connected to it every day.
yazioFlow.futureSelfAtlasText: Hold that future-self image in your mind. When things get hard, let it guide your next step.
yazioFlow.motivationEventQuestion: Do you have something coming up that's motivating you?

motivationEventOptions.family: A promise to myself or my family
motivationEventOptions.none: No specific event — just ready for change

yazioFlow.commitmentChallengeQuestion: How many days in a row can you commit to checking in?
yazioFlow.distractionsQuestion: What usually distracts you from your goals?
yazioFlow.consistencyPlanQuestion: How do you plan to stay consistent?

setbackPlanOptions.progress: Looking at how far I've come
setbackPlanOptions.routine: Returning to a simple daily routine
setbackPlanOptions.microGoal: Focusing on one small win at a time

yazioFlow.thankYouAtlasText: Thank you for trusting me, {{name}}. You're ready to turn this clarity into action.
yazioFlow.personalizedPlanText: Based on your answers, {{name}}, we estimate you'll start feeling more clarity and purpose within 30 days.

onboarding.defineYourPath: Select your niche, desired outcome, and preferred duration
onboarding.nicheHelper: What field or area do you want to focus on?
onboarding.desiredOutcomeHelper: What do you want to achieve?
desiredOutcomeOptions: Become an expert in my field
onboarding.durationHelper: How long do you want to commit?
onboarding.whatCanBePaidFor: What you can be paid for
onboarding.whatDoYouLoveSubtext: This is about joy, not just hobbies. We're looking for activities that make you lose track of time—where effort feels effortless. Be honest; there's no 'right' answer.
onboarding.whatDoYouLoveHelper: Your answer helps us identify paths that won't feel like 'work' because they align with your natural passion.
onboarding.whatAreYouGoodAtSubtext: Skills you've built AND talents that come easily to you both count. Include soft skills like empathy or problem-solving, not just technical abilities.
onboarding.whatAreYouGoodAtHelper: We use this to suggest paths where you'll have a competitive advantage—not because you're the best, but because you can grow faster here than others.
onboarding.whatDoesWorldNeedSubtext: This isn't about saving the world—it's about what problems you personally care about solving.
onboarding.whatDoesWorldNeedHelper: Your answer ensures suggested paths have purpose, not just profit.
onboarding.whatCanBePaidForQuestion: What can you be paid for?
onboarding.whatCanBePaidForSubtext: This grounds your passion in reality. We're looking for where your skills meet market demand. If you're uncertain, that's okay—we'll suggest paths that help you discover this.
onboarding.whatCanBePaidForHelper: What skills or services could generate income? Dream BIG!
onboarding.ikigaiExplanation: Your ikigai is your purpose—what gets you out of bed each morning with joy and meaning.
onboarding.ikigaiModalText:
Ikigai (生き甲斐) is a Japanese concept meaning "a reason for being."

It represents the intersection of:

• What you love
• What you're good at
• What the world needs
• What you can be paid for

Your ikigai is your purpose—what gets you out of bed each morning with joy and meaning.
onboarding.customPathHeading: I have my own goal in mind
onboarding.customPathHeadingPath: I have my own path in mind
onboarding.goalTitleHelper: What do you want to achieve?
onboarding.descriptionHelper: Why does this goal matter to you?
onboarding.milestoneAdvice: Arrange your milestones in order of priority. Start with the most important steps that will lead you to your goal. Each milestone should build upon the previous one.
onboarding.targetTimelineHelper: Set a deadline for your goal
onboarding.goalQuote: A goal without a plan is just a wish.

levelComplete.congratulations: Congratulations {{userName}}, you did it! We are all so proud of you and there is no doubt that you will achieve {{goalName}} soon. Just remember, nothing beats the feeling of achieving the goal that you set for yourself.
levelComplete.shareMessage: I just completed Level {{level}} on my journey to {{goalName}}!
levelComplete.feelingQuestion: How are you feeling about your progress?
levelComplete.goalCompleteMessage: Congratulations, {{userName}}! You've completed all levels of your goal: {{goalName}}. This is a huge achievement and you should be incredibly proud of yourself.

levelDetail.needTimeMessage:
Taking your time is completely okay. This quest will be here waiting for you whenever you're ready. There's no rush - your journey is yours to pace.

Would you like to come back to this later?
levelDetail.readyNow: I'm ready to complete it right now

1.name: Research an organization
1.description: Research 20 organizations in the internship field you're interested in. Write them down and find out the leadership board of those organizations.

2.name: write a cover letter
2.description: Create a compelling cover letter that highlights your skills and passion for the role.

3.name: submit applications
3.description: Submit your applications to at least 10 organizations you researched.

4.name: follow up
4.description: Follow up with the organizations you applied to and prepare for interviews.

paywall.callingDescription: We analyze your personality patterns, decision-making style, and motivations to suggest practical, aligned goals.

clarityMap.inspirationModalHeading: What counts as heavy or unclear?
clarityMap.inspirationModalBody:
Things you might be carrying:

• Decisions you're avoiding
• Worries on repeat
• Feelings you can name
• Questions without answers
• Responsibilities waiting on you
• Conversations you're putting off
• Dreams that feel unreachable
clarityMap.fallbackInsight: Take a moment to reflect on what matters most to you. Your thoughts reveal what deserves your attention and what can be released for now. Trust yourself to focus on what truly matters.

ikigaiCompass.conclusionLoadError: We couldn't load your Ikigai summary. Check your connection and open this screen again.
ikigaiCompass.helpModalText: On this screen, you can see your Ikigai answers. If you wish to change any of your answer inputs, simply tap the edit button on any card. When you update your answers, you'll receive a newly generated report at the bottom, and your next goals will be generated with your new Ikigai in mind.

progress.helperModalBody: This screen helps you see how you've engaged with your journey this week—not to judge, but to notice. We track patterns in your thoughts, celebrate small wins, and suggest gentle next steps. There's no 'right' amount of progress. Every bit of self-reflection counts.

badgeMessages.progress7Days: You've consistently hit your goals for 7 days straight. This badge recognizes your unwavering dedication and momentum.
badgeMessages.progressCompleted: You've completed {count} {goalLabel}. Every summit starts with a single step.
badgeMessages.careerDedication: Your dedication to professional growth is inspiring. This badge celebrates your career milestones.
badgeMessages.socialCourage: Your courage in building connections is remarkable. This badge honors your social growth.
badgeMessages.personalBravery: Your bravery in facing personal challenges is inspiring. This badge celebrates your inner strength.
badgeMessages.progressDefault: You're making progress! Keep showing up and watch your achievements grow.
badgeMessages.progressConsistency: You've consistently shown up this week. This badge recognizes your dedication.

focus.completionMessage: You've completed your focus session! Your forest has grown beautifully.

guide.title: How Focus Sanctuary works
guide.intro: Pick a session length, start the timer, and stay with the growing scene. The forest and Atlas are visual companions for your focus block—not a race, just steady presence.
guide.bodyTimer: Choose 5–60 minutes. On iPhone you confirm with Start growing; on iPad the session begins when you tap a duration. Reset returns you to pick a new length; I'm Done saves your time and returns home.
guide.bodyGrowth: The seed and trees evolve as time passes—height and vitality on the card mirror your progress through the session. Atlas appears near the end as a quiet milestone.
guide.soundBody: Optional loops (forest, rain, waves, fire, wind) play only while the timer is running. Turn sound off with the switch or pick a different texture before you start. Your choice is remembered for next time.

common.level1Desc: Set clear intentions and define your path
common.level2Desc: Organize resources and create your strategy
common.level3Desc: Take the first meaningful action forward
common.goalStep2: Break it down into smaller steps
common.benefit1Body: Achieve your goal through clear, step-by-step actions that turn progress into a motivating, game-like journey.
common.benefit2Body: Get instant guidance on what to do next, stay consistent, and push through doubt with an AI guide that adapts to you.
common.benefit3Body: Work with full focus on one task at a time, making it easier to start, finish, and build momentum.
common.benefit4Body: See visible progress and celebrate real wins, reinforcing motivation and confidence as you move forward.
common.networkErrorSubtext: Check your internet connection and try again.

newGoal.heading: Start a new goal
newGoal.dreamQuestion: What's a dream that excites AND scares you?
newGoal.dreamSubtext: Think about the vision that keeps you up at night with both joy and nervousness.
newGoal.fearQuestion: What specific fear holds you back?
newGoal.fearSubtext: Identifying the wall is the first step to climbing over it. Be as specific as possible.
newGoal.fillBothFields: Please fill in both dream and fear fields.
newGoal.createError: Failed to create goal. Please try again.
newGoal.dreamHelper:
Here are some ideas to help you identify a dream that excites and scares you:

• Starting your own business
• Changing careers completely
• Moving to a new city or country
• Learning a new skill or language
• Pursuing a creative passion
• Building meaningful relationships

Think about what makes you feel both excited and nervous - that's often where growth happens!
newGoal.fearHelper:
Here are some common fears that hold people back:

• Fear of failure or rejection
• Fear of what others will think
• Fear of the unknown
• Fear of not being good enough
• Fear of losing security or stability
• Fear of making the wrong decision

What specific fear resonates with you? Be honest and specific about what's holding you back.
newGoal.successTitle: Your goal has been successfully added
newGoal.successText: Your goal has been added to the goal section. You can start working on it right away!
newGoal.queueText: To prevent overstimulation, your goal has been added to your queue. Once you complete your first goal, you can access this one.
